text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity in this setting. The environment is clean, modern, and organized—the glass walls invite transparency while the bright lights spark a feeling of alertness. Entering the R+D space, I am struck by the vibrancy and the celebration of intellectual endeavor. Words about research, innovation, and coexistence ignite philosophical questions within me about the purpose and direction of technological progress. I feel like I’m at the threshold of discovery, both externally in this space and internally in my thoughts.
